diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Token SkyLink Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.4.1.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](0d4a37e4-56d2-49c2-8166-9bc934ebeddf), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.4.1.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](35b78704-fd3a-4d05-95b3-ba20f73b4c18).

This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Token SkyLink Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.4.1.1.2 - Active Instances Directory](0d4a37e4-56d2-49c2-8166-9bc934ebeddf), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.4.1.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](35b78704-fd3a-4d05-95b3-ba20f73b4c18).
